name: Laravel 11 Profile Site
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git curl libpng-dev libonig-dev libxml2-dev zip unzip && docker-php-ext-install pdo_mysql mbstring exif pcntl bcmath gd && curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer && composer install || true
